ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard code for the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square mile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL, CA) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the state data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "persons_25_plus" INTEGER /* Number of persons 25 and over */,
  "persons_25_plus_bachelors_degree" INTEGER /* Number of persons 25 and over with a bachelor's degree */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "sex_ratio" REAL /* Sex ratio (male/female) of the population */,
  "race_black" INTEGER /* Number of Black persons */,
  "race_asian" INTEGER /* Number of Asian persons */,
  "race_native" INTEGER /* Number of Native American persons */,
  "race_other" INTEGER /* Number of persons of other races */,
  "race_mixed" INTEGER /* Number of persons of mixed race */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of persons in the labor force */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed persons */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the county */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent */,
  "unemployment_rate_change" REAL /* Change in unemployment rate from the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the economic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "high_school_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of high school graduates */,
  "bachelors_degree_holders" INTEGER /* Number of persons holding a bachelor's degree */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate */,
  "bachelors_degree_completion_rate" REAL /* Bachelor's degree completion rate */,
  "graduate_degree_holders" INTEGER /* Number of persons holding a graduate degree */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the education data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "trump_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Trump */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "democrat_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic candidate */,
  "independent_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for independent candidates */,
  "turnout_rate" REAL /* Voter turnout rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the election data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id", "election_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees 16 and over */,
  "agriculture_employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees in agriculture */,
  "mining_employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees in mining */,
  "manufacturing_employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees in manufacturing */,
  "construction_employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees in construction */,
  "retail_employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees in retail */,
  "service_employees_16_plus" INTEGER /* Number of employees in service industries */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the employment data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicity" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "hispanic_persons" INTEGER /* Number of Hispanic persons */,
  "white_persons" INTEGER /* Number of White persons */,
  "asian_persons" INTEGER /* Number of Asian persons */,
  "native_persons" INTEGER /* Number of Native American persons */,
  "other_persons" INTEGER /* Number of persons of other ethnicities */,
  "mixed_persons" INTEGER /* Number of persons of mixed ethnicity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ethnicity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterans" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "veterans_18_plus" INTEGER /* Number of veterans 18 and over */,
  "female_veterans_18_plus" INTEGER /* Number of female veterans 18 and over */,
  "male_veterans_18_plus" INTEGER /* Number of male veterans 18 and over */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the veteran data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "civilians" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "civilians_18_plus" INTEGER /* Number of civilians 18 and over */,
  "female_civilians_18_plus" INTEGER /* Number of female civilians 18 and over */,
  "male_civilians_18_plus" INTEGER /* Number of male civilians 18 and over */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the civilian data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_force" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "labor_force_change" REAL /* Change in labor force participation rate from the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the labor force data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)
